Update: The voters of America owe a debt of gratitude to the Maricopa County Audit volunteers.

quotedTweet.content:
Welcome Back Election Deniers!

The only place in America voters ever got to examine all of their own 2020 ballots after certification was Maricopa County AZ.

The AZ Senate AUTHORIZED & SUPERVISED this OFFICIAL audit by voter-volunteers.

They found - a lot of problems ...
1/6

twitter.content:
Update: The voters of America owe a debt of gratitude to the Maricopa County Audit volunteers.

They donated thousands of hours of their time to insure the truth would be uncovered and recorded. They succeeded.

And now the @FBI has their findings. 👇
